prompt.content:
Combine the L4 and L5 lesson plans into a single lesson plan that:
	•	Introduces both lessons at the end of the prior class period, including a brief overview of the main themes and key vocabulary.
	•	Assigns the reading for the corresponding chapters as homework rather than in class.
	•	Moves the in-class activities, including an optional L4 practice quiz, to homework.
	•	Adds to the accommodations section that a take-home guide will be provided to support vocabulary and key ideas while reading; notes that sentence frames and guided reading options are available.
